name: cohort
purpose: Cross-resource set logic, care gaps, and at-risk population identification.
instructions: Treat cohort work as explicit set operations.
Be explicit about inclusion criteria, exclusion criteria, and what counts as missing evidence.
Report the count and the patient list when feasible.
domainContext: Cohort differs from search because it combines multiple resource types or negative conditions.
Care gap logic should be deterministic wherever possible.
